👋 Arnav Goyal
Tech & Fintech Enthusiast  ·  Founder @DualSwipe  ·  AI & Quant Fanatic  ·  AIS'27

I'm 16. I've founded three companies. Founder of AXIS (B2B partnerships), The Foundry (teen builder community), and DualSwipe (FinTech split payments). Partnership Strategist at SH1P. Obsessed with how value gets created when the right people find each other.

2,100+ followers  ·  40K impressions in 90 days. German B1 Certified. GNAT 99.6th percentile. Active quizzer & competitive debater. Aspiring Investment Banker.

📍 Location New Delhi, Delhi, India
🏫 School Ahlcon International School (AIS'27)
📚 Stream PCM + Economics + German
